commands_executed: grep / read of justfile, package.json, turbo.json, .github/workflows/ci.yml, biome.json, vitest.config.ts, vitest.e2e.config.ts, AGENTS.md, README.md, docs/**
commands_skipped: pnpm install / build / test (not executed — read-only pass)
just dev / just harness dev / just preflight (not booted)
safety_notes: Read-only static assessment. No services booted, no deps installed, no state mutated, no external calls, no secret values read.
Six read-only inspector subagents fanned out over disjoint subsystems; this orchestrator merged + scored.
Sensors marked configured_unverified were evidenced by file/recipe inspection + prior recorded runs (e.g. swift test 75/75, streamd-smoke 40/40 in Plan 088 logs), not executed in this run.

verdict.weaker_axis: Adaptability (B, 70%) trails Operate-Today (A, 93%) — final_grade does not hide it; the single weakest area is Architecture enforcement & complexity (E).

harness_surfaces.surface: harness/ workspace pkg + harness CLI (Docker dev container)
docs/c4 + docs/domains/registry.md + docs/adr (14) + docs/plans (86, the-flow flight plans)

topology.monorepo_layout: apps/{web,cli} + packages/{mcp-server,positional-graph,shared,workflow,workgraph} + harness/ (pnpm workspaces) + native/streamd (Swift SwiftPM, OUTSIDE pnpm graph)
topology.local_dev_topology: two environments: host dev server (just dev) AND Docker dev container (just harness dev); per-worktree port allocation
topology.persistence: file-based JSON (~/.config/chainglass/*.json, repo .chainglass/) + driverless single-file SQLite (session-store.db) — NO server DB/cache/queue/search driver in any package.json

axis_a_operate_today.name: Cold-start orientation & repo map
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: README.md + AGENTS.md maintained (run/validate/current-work/traps); docs/c4 L1-L3 + docs/domains/registry.md (29 domains) + 14 ADRs.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Dragged down by ~14 STALE root *.md scratch docs (START_HERE.md, INDEX.md, INTERFACE_*x5, HARNESS_INDEX/INTERFACES/SUMMARY, QUESTION_POPPER_*, etc., last touched 2026-03-10). START_HERE.md is a FALSE front door pointing at Question-Popper feature docs. Real front door (README+AGENTS) is not named to stand out.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Setup & environment contract
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: .nvmrc=20.19.0 + engines + engine-strict; pnpm-lock + workspace + turbo.json; apps/web/.env.example documents every secret w/ generation cmds + safe defaults; Docker image pins toolchain; flutter-doctor-style `harness doctor` + host `just preflight`.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Minor: no devcontainer.json; HARNESS_*/CG_REMOTE_VIEW__*/TERMINAL_WS_* env vars documented only in Dockerfile/source comments.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Locality of infra & external-dependency exposure
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: No remote infra to stand up (no DB/cache/queue/search driver); auth bypassable (DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH→fake session); every external/model dep has a Fake in createTestContainer; services are loopback (MCP stdio, terminal WS, streamd JWT localhost). streamd headless smoke proves daemon without TCC.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Two real pressure points: CLI agent-exec path hard-requires GH_TOKEN; streamd LIVE capture needs macOS TCC grants (host-Mac-only).

axis_a_operate_today.name: Harness front door & command discoverability
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: Single justfile front door; default recipe = `just --list`; stable verbs (check/fft/build/test/lint/typecheck); wf-*/harness-cg are --json-first; CI mirrors core verbs.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Inspector graded above-scale (4); capped at 3. The word 'harness' is overloaded 5 ways (see existing_harness_concepts) — a discoverability tax flagged HIGH, but the command surface itself is singular and discoverable.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Boot & health/readiness path
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: Strong primitives that exit non-zero: just preflight (CLI freshness, dev PID, .chainglass), harness-require (curl app port), harness doctor --wait, container health-poll, streamd /health gate, GET /api/health.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Fragmented across host/harness/streamd; NO single root `just boot`/`just up`/`just doctor` aggregator. just dev is persistent with no built-in readiness assertion.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Seed, fixture, reset, cleanup state
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: harness test-data create/clean/status (idempotent, deterministic slugs, envelope output); harness seed; cross-language fixtures shared TS↔Swift; fake-streamd owns/never-mutates seed w/ full teardown; just reset/clean.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Only gap: no single 'reset all runtime state' across session-store.db + .chainglass + session-state.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Supported interaction surfaces
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: 32 Next.js API routes; ~25 cg CLI command groups (--json envelope); MCP tools (check_health, wf_compose, phase_*); workflow engine wf-* recipes; minih runner; streamd/fake-streamd WS; Playwright/CDP drive; DOCUMENTED auth bypass (first-class, not a hidden shortcut).
axis_a_operate_today.notes: No OpenAPI/GraphQL schema doc, but routes are conventionally discoverable + Next MCP get_routes exists.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Existing deterministic back-pressure sensors
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: biome lint + multi-workspace tsc + vitest(+coverage) + turbo build run locally AND in CI with an alls-green gate; plus security-audit, swift test, headless streamd-smoke (auth/handshake/frames/lifecycle), remote-view-stream-smoke, harness-verify (Turbopack chunking catcher).
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Inspector graded above-scale (4); capped at 3. Deductions: NO pre-commit gate; CI typecheck narrower than local (root tsc only); security-audit/swift-test/e2e/streamd-smoke are local-only (not enforced per change).

axis_a_operate_today.name: Observability & evidence artifacts
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: minih run artifacts (report.json findings+exitReason+retrospective.magicWand, events.ndjson ~3MB, schemas); CLI --json/--pretty/--stream(NDJSON); pino structured logging; harness-verify JSON httpStatus+consoleErrors; Playwright screenshots + console-*.log; streamd stats/client-stats telemetry; 313 execution.log.md.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: No central metrics/trace backend (OTel), but per-run artifacts are excellent.

axis_a_operate_today.name: Compounding harness loop
axis_a_operate_today.evidence: Friction ledger (harness-wishlist W001-W011 → real fix tasks; W001/W003/W008 fixed same session); docs/retros/; per-run magicWand + retrospective.difficulties mirrored to retros; 20+ run history; the-flow.json flight plans; 14 ADRs; 86 plans.
axis_a_operate_today.notes: Repo's strongest axis — loop is real and exercised. Minor: retros are agent-runner-centric; broader dev-friction retros thinner.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Structural coupling & blast radius
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: 405 importers of @chainglass/shared, 133 of workflow, 60 of positional-graph; cross-feature hub 041-file-browser (30 inbound); di-container.ts 958L. No real package cycles (shared is a leaf; apparent cycle was doc-comments only); tsconfig path aliases gate access.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Acyclic + layered, but very high fan-in hubs give large blast radius; boundaries enforced by aliases+prose, not sensors.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Temporal / change coupling
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: git log --name-only(-200): TS protocol (088-remote-view) co-changes with native/streamd/*.swift + fixtures (dual-language mirror); browser-client.tsx with 084 plan docs.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Real cross-language co-change coupling is the main hidden link. Confidence medium — mined breadth only, not per-pair statistics.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Cohesion & locality of change
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: Clear feature-folder layout (apps/web/src/features/NNN-name) + docs/domains. BUT 508 tests centralized in /test, 0 co-located. God files: positional-graph.command.ts 3348L, positional-graph.service.ts 2602L, console-output.adapter.ts 2376L, worknode.service.ts 1979L, browser-client.tsx 1657L.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Strong domain ownership undermined by far-from-code tests + several >2000-line catch-all files.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Seams, substitution & dependency inversion
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: Textbook ports-and-adapters: createTestContainer mirrors createProductionContainer over ~30 DI tokens; 22 I*-interfaces + 18 fakes in packages/shared; 42 *.contract.test.ts run the SAME suite vs fake AND real adapter (proves fakes are behaviour-faithful, not stubs).
axis_b_adaptability.notes: The seams the tests inject at (every DI token) are directly reusable as harness substitution points.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Hermetic, offline & isolated testability
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: vitest.config.ts unit lane (offline, fakes, no creds/DB, 444 tests) physically separated from vitest.e2e.config.ts (real agent CLIs, excluded from default); per-test isolated containers; fake-streamd binds 127.0.0.1:0 + tears down.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: High hermeticity; minor erosion: a couple production-container factories shell out to git/tmux (prod path only).

axis_b_adaptability.name: Side-effect isolation & external-effect sinks
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: FakeCentralEventNotifier.emittedEvents (SSE sink); fake-streamd.inputLog + .received (injected input/control sink); video-frame fixture cassette; FakeProcessManager/FakeTmuxExecutor/FakePty; production CopilotClient(--allow-all-tools) built ONLY in production container → accidental prod calls structurally prevented.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Fakes/sinks (real substitutes + recorded effects), not brittle mocks (13 vi.mock files vs 266 Fake importers).

axis_b_adaptability.name: State evolution & consequence verification
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: PROTOCOL_VERSION=1 (Zod literal) mirrored Swift WireProtocol.version=1 + E_VERSION gate; additive-evolution doc; Zod-validated control messages. But NO DB migration tooling, no schemaVersion on persisted JSON/sqlite, no migrations/ dir.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Wire-protocol versioning strong + dual-language verified; persisted-state/file-format evolution unguarded.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Architecture boundary enforceability
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: biome.json = recommended rules only; NO dependency-cruiser/eslint-boundaries/semgrep/ArchUnit. Arch rules are PROSE: AGENTS.md 'Search Before Creating — Mandatory Concept Check' (human/agent-enforced), DEPENDENCY_MAP.md, DESIGN_PATTERNS.md. Package access limited only by tsconfig aliases.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Intent well-documented but NOT encoded as a sensor; nothing fails CI on a forbidden cross-boundary import or duplicated concept. Single weakest area.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Complexity, size & navigability thresholds
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: biome recommended-only — no cognitive-complexity/max-lines rule; no knip/jscpd/ts-prune; tsconfig lacks noUnusedLocals/noUnusedParameters. Largest files 3348/2602/2376L unguarded.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: No size/complexity/duplication/dead-code sensors; navigability rests on conventions + docs.

axis_b_adaptability.name: Inner-loop speed & repeatability
axis_b_adaptability.evidence: turbo caches build/test/lint/typecheck (output globs, ^build deps); split lanes (unit/e2e/harness/per-feature watch); coverage thresholds enforced (50%); 65 files use fake-timers/deterministic IDs; preflight kills stale port PIDs; registry-backed streamd-kill avoids cross-worktree kills.
axis_b_adaptability.notes: Fast, cacheable, repeatable. Minor: dev ports derived (NEXT+1500) not per-worktree allocated → concurrent worktrees on default PORT collide.

assessment_matrix.rationale: README+AGENTS strong, but ~14 stale root *.md + a false START_HERE.md actively mislead a fresh agent.
Pinned runtimes, documented secrets w/ defaults, two reproducible dev envs, layered doctor/preflight.
Singular justfile front door + rich CI-gated deterministic sensors; dings: no pre-commit gate, CI typecheck narrower than local.
Broad interaction surfaces, idempotent seed/reset, excellent machine-readable run artifacts.
Real wishlist→fix-task + magicWand→retro loop, run history, SDD flight plans, ADRs.
Ports-and-adapters with fake+real contract parity; fakes/sinks over mocks; hermetic unit lane.
Clear features but high fan-in hubs, mega-files, far-from-code tests, TS↔Swift co-change.
Boundaries + complexity are prose only — no executable sensor; the single weakest area.
Strong wire-protocol versioning; no migration/schemaVersion for persisted JSON/sqlite.
Cached turbo, split lanes, deterministic clocks, idempotent cleanup.

gaps.title: CI typecheck narrower than local (root tsc only vs per-workspace loop)
gaps.recommended_next_action: Replace ci.yml:71 `pnpm tsc --noEmit` with `just typecheck` (or the same per-workspace loop).

gaps.title: Architecture boundaries are prose, not an executable sensor
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add dependency-cruiser/eslint-boundaries encoding shared=leaf + no cross-feature internals; wire into `just check`+CI.

gaps.title: Root *.md sprawl drowns the real front door; START_HERE.md is a false front door
gaps.recommended_next_action: Archive ~14 stale root scratch docs under docs/; leave README.md+AGENTS.md (+1 index); delete/rewrite START_HERE.md to redirect.

gaps.title: 'harness' overloaded across 5 concepts with no front-door disambiguation
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add a 'Harness terminology' table to AGENTS.md/README; record the coexist-vs-supplant decision at the adopt bridge.

gaps.title: native/streamd (Swift) has zero CI coverage — swift test + smokes are local/host-only
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add a macOS CI job running swift test + headless `just streamd-smoke` (no TCC needed).

gaps.title: No pre-commit / client-side gate — enforcement deferred to CI or manual just fft
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add lefthook/husky + lint-staged running biome (+ optional staged tsc).

gaps.title: No size/complexity/duplication/dead-code sensors; several >2000-line mega-files
gaps.recommended_next_action: Enable biome cognitive-complexity + max-lines; add knip+jscpd to the check lane; target the 5 files >1900L.

gaps.title: No single root boot/doctor aggregator
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add a root `just doctor`/`just up` composing preflight + harness-require + harness doctor into one verdict.

gaps.title: security-audit local-only — not enforced in CI
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add `pnpm audit --audit-level=high` as a CI step.

gaps.title: Tests centralized in /test, none co-located with source
gaps.recommended_next_action: Adopt co-located *.test.ts for new features, or document the centralized mirror-path convention as intentional.

gaps.title: No migration/schemaVersion for persisted JSON + sqlite state
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add schemaVersion + a forward-migration/compat test for persisted workspace/session JSON, mirroring the wire-protocol versioning.

gaps.title: High fan-in hubs (shared 405, workflow 133) create large blast radius
gaps.recommended_next_action: Split @chainglass/shared barrel into narrower entrypoints (interfaces vs adapters vs state); track fan-in as a sensor.

gaps.title: New engineering-harness boot contract entirely TODO (L0)
gaps.recommended_next_action: Fill .harness/engineering-harness.md Boot/Health/Interact/Observe by WRAPPING existing canonical commands (see candidate_first_harness_surfaces) — adoption build-boot step.

gaps.title: Workspace registration + GitHub OAuth are click/hand-ops with no scripted path
gaps.recommended_next_action: Expose `harness seed` at root as the scripted workspace-register path; document DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH for fresh agents.

gaps.title: CLI agent-execution path hard-requires GH_TOKEN with no fake/offline mode
gaps.recommended_next_action: Add a documented fake/dry-run mode for cg agent-exec (reuse FakeAgentAdapter).

gaps.title: Two competing harness governance docs at different maturities (L3 vs L0)
gaps.recommended_next_action: Cross-link docs/project-rules/harness.md and .harness/engineering-harness.md; state which is authoritative for which concern (record at the bridge).

gaps.title: Dev ports derived (NEXT+1500), not per-worktree allocated
gaps.recommended_next_action: Allocate a deterministic per-worktree port offset so concurrent worktrees don't collide on default PORT.

gaps.title: Stale runtime files leak in .chainglass (orphaned .pids.json + 0-byte .tmp)
gaps.recommended_next_action: Have the terminal sidecar / streamd lifecycle atomically clean its own pids/tmp on exit.

evidence_log.finding: Single justfile front door; default recipe = `just --list`; check/fft compose the quality verbs
CI = lint/build/typecheck/test→gate(alls-green); typecheck is root-tsc only (narrower than local per-workspace loop)
No pre-commit gate of any kind (no husky/lefthook/pre-commit); .git/hooks only *.sample
Node 20.19.0 pinned 3 ways; pnpm@9.15.4; committed lockfile; Docker image pins toolchain
Auth fully bypassable for local/headless (DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH→fake session); Docker sets DISABLE_AUTH=true
Every external/agent dep has a Fake in createTestContainer; production CopilotClient(--allow-all-tools) only in production container
No server-DB driver anywhere; session-store.db is driverless sqlite w/ no app coupling; persistence is file-based JSON
streamd: loopback JWT(HS256)-gated WS; headless smoke proves protocol/auth without TCC; LIVE capture needs macOS TCC (host-Mac)
harness-verify catches Turbopack chunking/render errors tsc+vitest miss (Plan 084 FX007)
Ports-and-adapters: 22 interfaces + 18 fakes; 42 contract suites run fake AND real; 13 vi.mock vs 266 Fake importers
Cross-language fixture oracle: Swift tests read the SAME TS-authored JSON (auth vectors, frame-header)
Two test lanes: hermetic unit (vitest.config.ts, 444 tests, fakes, no net) vs e2e (vitest.e2e.config.ts, real CLIs, excluded from default)
Architecture rules are PROSE only — no dependency-cruiser/eslint-boundaries/semgrep; biome recommended-only
No complexity/size/dup/dead-code sensors; god files 3348/2602/2376/1979/1657L
High fan-in: shared 405 importers, workflow 133, positional-graph 60; no real package cycles (shared is a leaf)
Compounding loop: wishlist W001-W011→fix tasks; per-run magicWand+difficulties mirrored to docs/retros; 20+ run history; 86 plans; 14 ADRs
5 distinct 'harness' meanings; new .harness/ stamped L0 with empty boot contract; intent to supplant the L3 Docker harness
Root *.md sprawl (23 files); ~14 stale (2026-03-10); START_HERE.md points at Question-Popper feature docs not the system
TS↔Swift dual-language co-change coupling (088-remote-view + native/streamd + fixtures move together)
Workspace registration only via web UI; GitHub OAuth hand-configured (mitigated by DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH)
